title: Stackable Shulker Boxes
description: Shulker Boxes will now stack up to 64!
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) ⚠️**

# 📦 Stackable Shulker Boxes
- **Shulker Boxes stack to 64**, allowing you to store empty shulker boxes easier
- **Compatible with vanilla clients**, without any disparity
